name: Enumerating non-rooted trees
statement_text:
The generating functions for trees and non-superfluous trees
are
                               x                
                φ(x) = θ(x) −     θ(x)2 − θ(x2 ) ,               (304b)
                               2                
                               x
                ψ(x) = θ(x) −     θ(x)2 + θ(x2 ) .               (304c)
                               2
preamble: The theorem gives generating functions for trees and non-superfluous trees, building on combinatorial counting of rooted trees and their symmetries. The preceding text derives expressions for the number of trees by subtracting pairs with unequal orders and handling special cases for even and odd orders, leading to formula (304a).
